name: Blade of Testing
entries: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
When you hit with this weapon, the target takes an extra 1d6 radiant damage.

name: Amulet of Test Protection
entries: While wearing this amulet, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

name: Potion of Test Healing
entries: When you drink this potion, you regain 3d8 + 3 hit points.
